rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant 1001 California Street Condominium Homeowners Associations Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication, Of Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication, Of Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint continued to July 21, 2020 on Court's own motion. Trial is continued to September 1, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after July 21, 2020/September 1, 2020 respectively, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on April 29, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/CFH)
